Package org.eventb.internal.ui.proofpurger

Class ProofPurgerSelectionDialog

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.jface.window.Window
org.eclipse.jface.dialogs.Dialog
org.eclipse.jface.dialogs.TrayDialog
org.eclipse.ui.dialogs.SelectionDialog
org.eclipse.ui.dialogs.SelectionStatusDialog
org.eclipse.ui.dialogs.CheckedTreeSelectionDialog
org.eventb.internal.ui.proofpurger.ProofPurgerSelectionDialog
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.eclipse.jface.window.IShellProvider
public class ProofPurgerSelectionDialog extends org.eclipse.ui.dialogs.CheckedTreeSelectionDialog
Dialog for the selection of proofs to be removed by the proof purger.
